    Class MeshPrimitive

    Geometry to be rendered with the given material.

    public sealed class MeshPrimitive : ExtraProperties, IExtraProperties, IChildOf<Mesh>

    Properties

    Name Description
    DrawPrimitiveType
    IndexAccessor
    LogicalIndex

    Gets the zero-based index of this MeshPrimitive at Primitives.
    LogicalParent

    Gets the Mesh instance that owns this MeshPrimitive instance.

    Gets or sets the Material instance, or null.
